# Port target: `eslint-plugin-mocha`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-plugin-mocha` @ `11.3.0` |
| Baseline npm version | `11.3.0` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 24 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `consistent-interface` | Enforces consistent use of mocha interfaces | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/consistent-interface.md) |
| 2 | `consistent-spacing-between-blocks` | Require consistent spacing between blocks | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/consistent-spacing-between-blocks.md) |
| 3 | `handle-done-callback` | Enforces handling of callbacks for async tests | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/handle-done-callback.md) |
| 4 | `max-top-level-suites` | Enforce the number of top-level suites in a single file | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/max-top-level-suites.md) |
| 5 | `no-async-suite` | Disallow async functions passed to a suite | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-async-suite.md) |
| 6 | `no-empty-title` | Disallow empty test descriptions | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-empty-title.md) |
| 7 | `no-exclusive-tests` | Disallow exclusive tests | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-exclusive-tests.md) |
| 8 | `no-exports` | Disallow exports from test files | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-exports.md) |
| 9 | `no-global-tests` | Disallow global tests | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-global-tests.md) |
| 10 | `no-hooks` | Disallow hooks | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-hooks.md) |
| 11 | `no-hooks-for-single-case` | Disallow hooks for a single test or test suite | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-hooks-for-single-case.md) |
| 12 | `no-identical-title` | Disallow identical titles | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-identical-title.md) |
| 13 | `no-mocha-arrows` | Disallow arrow functions as arguments to mocha functions | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-mocha-arrows.md) |
| 14 | `no-nested-tests` | Disallow tests to be nested within other tests | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-nested-tests.md) |
| 15 | `no-pending-tests` | Disallow pending tests | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-pending-tests.md) |
| 16 | `no-return-and-callback` | Disallow returning in a test or hook function that uses a callback | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-return-and-callback.md) |
| 17 | `no-return-from-async` | Disallow returning from an async test or hook | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-return-from-async.md) |
| 18 | `no-setup-in-describe` | Disallow setup in describe blocks | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-setup-in-describe.md) |
| 19 | `no-sibling-hooks` | Disallow duplicate uses of a hook at the same level inside a suite | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-sibling-hooks.md) |
| 20 | `no-synchronous-tests` | Disallow synchronous tests | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-synchronous-tests.md) |
| 21 | `no-top-level-hooks` | Disallow top-level hooks | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/no-top-level-hooks.md) |
| 22 | `prefer-arrow-callback` | Require using arrow functions for callbacks | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-arrow-callback.md) |
| 23 | `valid-suite-title` | Require suite descriptions to match a pre-configured regular expression | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/valid-suite-title.md) |
| 24 | `valid-test-title` | Require test descriptions to match a pre-configured regular expression | [docs](https://github.com/lo1tuma/eslint-plugin-mocha/blob/main/docs/rules/valid-test-title.md) |
